scripts.record:tools: npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness && node ./release/scripts/candidate-record.mjs --package tools --artifacts .artifacts/tools --records release/candidates/tools
scripts.verify:tools:candidate: npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness && node ./release/scripts/candidate-record.mjs --verify-current --package tools --artifacts .artifacts/tools --records release/candidates/tools
scripts.pack:tools: npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness:source && npm run prepare:tools:artifacts && npm pack --workspace pi-leetcode-tools --pack-destination .artifacts/tools --json && npm run record:tools
scripts.pack:tools:no-record: npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness:source && npm run prepare:tools:artifacts && npm pack --workspace pi-leetcode-tools --pack-destination .artifacts/tools --json
scripts.smoke:tools:public-reads: npm run verify:tools:artifact && npm run pack:tools && node ./packages/pi-leetcode-tools/scripts/smoke-public-reads.mjs .artifacts/tools
scripts.verify:tools:packed: npm run verify:tools:contract && npm run verify:tools:files && npm run test:tools:packed-install && npm run test:tools:pi-activation && npm run verify:tools:supply-chain
scripts.verify:tools:release: npm run typecheck --workspace pi-leetcode-tools && npm test --workspace pi-leetcode-tools && npm run build:tools:reproducible && npm run verify:tools:artifact && npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness:source && npm run pack:tools && npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness && npm run verify:tools:packed
scripts.verify:tools:release:no-record: npm run typecheck --workspace pi-leetcode-tools && npm test --workspace pi-leetcode-tools && npm run build:tools:reproducible && npm run verify:tools:artifact && npm run pack:tools:no-record && npm run verify:tools:upstream-completeness && npm run verify:tools:packed
